title: Housing Appeals Committee Delays 2025 Annual Report

abstracts.abstract: Report of the Executive Office of Housing and Livable Communities (pursuant to Section 22 of Chapter 40B of the General Laws, as amended by Section 15 of Chapter 150 of the Acts of 2024) submitting its 2025 annual report concerning delays of statutory deadlines in appeals before the Housing Appeals Committee (HAC)
